title: juncus compressus subsp. elatior
intro: Juncus compressus subsp. elatior, commonly known as soft rush or tall soft rush, is a plant species in the rush family (Juncaceae) that is characterized by its tall, slender stems and soft, green leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Juncus compressus subsp. elatior include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
